title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset password from Settings > Security.

title: Refund Policy
content: Refunds are allowed within 7 days of purchase.

title: Change Email Address
content: Users can change their email address from Settings > Profile > Edit Email.

title: Delete Account
content: Users can delete their account permanently from Settings > Account > Delete Account.

title: Subscription Plans
content: We offer Basic, Pro, and Enterprise subscription plans with different feature limits.

title: Cancel Subscription
content: Users can cancel their subscription from Billing > Manage Subscription.

title: Payment Methods
content: We accept credit cards, debit cards, and UPI for payments.

title: Update Payment Method
content: Users can update their payment method from Billing > Payment Methods.

title: Data Privacy
content: User data is encrypted and stored securely in compliance with industry standards.

title: Two-Factor Authentication
content: Users can enable two-factor authentication from Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication.

title: Contact Support
content: Users can contact support via the Help Center or by emailing support@gmail.com.

title: Download Invoice
content: Invoices can be downloaded from Billing > Invoices section.

title: Account Suspension
content: Accounts may be suspended if they violate our terms of service.

title: Restore Account
content: Suspended accounts can be restored by contacting customer support.

title: Update Profile Information
content: Users can update their profile information from Settings > Profile.

title: Recover Deleted Account
content: Deleted accounts cannot be recovered once permanently removed.

title: Disable Two-Factor Authentication
content: Users can disable two-factor authentication from Settings > Security.

title: Upgrade Subscription
content: Users can upgrade their subscription from Billing > Manage Subscription.

title: Downgrade Subscription
content: Users can downgrade their subscription from Billing > Manage Subscription.

title: Late Payment Policy
content: Accounts with overdue payments may experience temporary service suspension.

title: Data Retention Policy
content: We retain user data as long as the account remains active.

title: Export Account Data
content: Users can export their account data from Settings > Privacy > Export Data.

title: Restore Suspended Account
content: Suspended accounts can be restored by contacting customer support.

title: System Requirements
content: The platform supports the latest versions of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge browsers.

title: Mobile App Availability
content: The mobile app is available for both Android and iOS devices.

title: API Access
content: API access is available for Pro and Enterprise subscription plans.

title: Change Password
content: Users can change their password from Settings > Security > Change Password.

title: Login Issues
content: Users experiencing login issues should reset their password or contact support.

title: Account Verification
content: Users must verify their email address during account registration.
